---
title: "The Rt. Rev. John William Colenso"
---

## The Rt. Rev. John William Colenso

**Dates:** (1814-1883)

### Description

Bishop of Natal,

### Letters

- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from November 4, 1867
- Letter from Octr 10th [1867]
- Letter from Aug. 6, 1863.
- Letter from [November 1862]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
